description: This map displays a Natura 2000 (N2K) Area of Interest (AoI) with its 2km buffer, represented by a single light orange/peach polygon. Enclosed within this buffered AoI are numerous individual Natura 2000 site boundaries, depicted as fragmented light blue polygons. Each of these individual site polygons is repeatedly labelled with the Natura 2000 site code "FR7200672", indicating that multiple fragmented sites belonging to the same code are covered by a single buffered AoI. The map illustrates how the N2K AoI, including its 2km buffer zone, can encompass several discrete Natura 2000 site components. No scale bar, compass, legend, or specific reference year is visible on the map.
